creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: junovitch
Date: Sat Dec 26 14:07:00 UTC 2015
New revision: 404513
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/404513

Log:
  java/wildfly80: address non-root builds and minor QA observations

  - Drop ${CHMOD} usage and set permissions in pkg-plist (portlint)
  - Add terminating @owner/@group to pkg-plist (portlint)
  - Switch version specific path in pkg-message to variable

  PR:		205258
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (2 weeks)

Changes:
  head/java/wildfly80/Makefile
  head/java/wildfly80/files/pkg-message.in
  head/java/wildfly80/pkg-plist
